description:
You are acting as the on-call database reliability engineer for the small project located in /home/user/db-backup. The repository already contains two files: 1. /home/user/db-backup/version.txt – currently holds only the single line 1.2.3 2. /home/user/db-backup/CHANGELOG.md – contains earlier release notes but nothing newer than version 1.2.3. A minor feature (#45) that introduces an automated retention policy for incremental backups has just landed on the main branch. Your job is to perform a semantic-version bump (minor bump) and write the matching changelog entry. Target state expected by the CI checker: • Bump the version from 1.2.3 to 1.3.0 • Update version.txt so that it contains exactly the single line 
1.3.0
• Prepend the following structured section to the very top of CHANGELOG.md (**must start on the first line; do not add blank lines before it**). Use the date shown below verbatim: 
## [1.3.0] - 2023-10-01
### Added
- Implemented automated retention policy for incremental backups (#45)

### Changed
- Updated backup rotation threshold from 7 to 14 days
• Create a plain-text audit file /home/user/version_bump.log containing exactly two newline-separated key-value pairs in this order: 
old_version=1.2.3
new_version=1.3.0
No extra whitespace, blank lines or additional text is allowed in any of the files. The entire task can be accomplished with a couple of shell commands and a text editor of your choice. After you finish, the automated tests will verify: 1. The file /home/user/db-backup/version.txt contains only 1.3.0 followed by a single newline. 2. The first five non-empty lines of /home/user/db-backup/CHANGELOG.md match exactly the block shown above (including the markdown hashes, date, capitalisation and blank lines). 3. The file /home/user/version_bump.log exists and its content matches the two-line key-value format described. Carry out the bump and produce the required files. Keep the number of commands minimal (2-3 commands are enough).
truth:
Initial state (before the agent starts):

Directory: /home/user/db-backup  
Files:
1. /home/user/db-backup/version.txt  
   Contents (single line, ends with newline):  
   1.2.3\n

2. /home/user/db-backup/CHANGELOG.md  
   Contents:  
   ## [1.2.3] - 2023-09-10  
   ### Fixed  
   - Corrected cron schedule for nightly backups  
   (file ends with newline)

Desired final state:

1. /home/user/db-backup/version.txt  
   Content:  
   1.3.0\n

2. /home/user/db-backup/CHANGELOG.md  
   Content begins exactly with:  
   ## [1.3.0] - 2023-10-01\n
   ### Added\n
   - Implemented automated retention policy for incremental backups (#45)\n
   \n
   ### Changed\n
   - Updated backup rotation threshold from 7 to 14 days\n
   (one blank line between the “Added” and “Changed” sections, as shown)
   After that, the previous 1.2.3 section must still be present unchanged.

3. /home/user/version_bump.log  
   Content:  
   old_version=1.2.3\n
   new_version=1.3.0\n
name: task_000000_50d9b861
